blocks.text: A SNEAKY PLAN he two figures turn around. It is Rori and Anal "What do you want?" Drake asks. "Go back to sleep," Rori snaps. "Why should I?" he snaps back. Drake is tired of Rori being so bossy.

sentences.text: A SNEAKY PLAN he two figures turn around.
It is Rori and Anal "What do you want?"
Drake is tired of Rori being so bossy.

blocks.text: "Yeah, why should he?" Bo says. "And why are you two here?" Ana speaks up. "We are going to bring our dragons outside while the rest of the castle is asleep. Do you guys want to come? You can bring Worm and Shu." "This is a bad idea," Bo says. "No, it's not!" Rori says. "We're Dragon Masters! We should be able to take our dragons out whenever we want to." "You have a point," Drake agrees. "And I do think Worm will like to go outside again."

sentences.text: "We are going to bring our dragons outside while the rest of the castle is asleep.
Do you guys want to come?
You can bring Worm and Shu."
"This is a bad idea," Bo says.
We should be able to take our dragons out whenever we want to."
"And I do think Worm will like to go outside again."

blocks.text: Bo looks worried. "What if Griffith finds out?" he asks. "What if the king finds out?" "They won't find out," Rori says. "So long as neither of you say anything." She looks them both in the eyes. "Well, come on, then!" says Ana. Drake slips on his shoes. He follows the others down the hall. The door to Griffith's room is open. He is snoring loudly. ZZZZzzzzzzzzzzzzzz! Rori puts a finger to her lips. "Shhh!" As they tiptoe past the door, Drake peeks inside. The wizard's long beard flies up every time he snores.

sentences.text: "So long as neither of you say anything."
She looks them both in the eyes.
He follows the others down the hall.
The door to Griffith's room is open.
Rori puts a finger to her lips.
As they tiptoe past the door, Drake peeks inside.
The wizard's long beard flies up every time he snores.

blocks.text: The Dragon Masters walk down the stairs. The guard in front of the Training Room door is asleep, too. "That's Simon," Rori whispers. "He always falls asleep." They tiptoe past Simon and into the Training Room. The torches are not lit, so the room is black. Rori lights a candle. Then she passes candles to each of them.

sentences.text: The Dragon Masters walk down the stairs.
The guard in front of the Training Room door is asleep, too.
They tiptoe past Simon and into the Training Room.
The torches are not lit, so the room is black.
Then she passes candles to each of them.

blocks.text: "Now, lets's get the dragons!" she says, still whispering They reach Vulcan's cave first. Rori opens the gate. "Wake up, Vulcan," she says. "We're going outside." Grumbling, Vulcan gets to his feet. Ana and Bo wakes up their dragons. Drake goes into Worm's cave. "Worm, do you want to go outside?" Drake asks.

sentences.text: she says, still whispering They reach Vulcan's cave first.
Grumbling, Vulcan gets to his feet.
Ana and Bo wakes up their dragons.
"Worm, do you want to go outside?"

blocks.text: Worm lifts his head. His eyes shoot wide open. They stare right at Drake. Drake gets a strange feeling. "Come on, Worm," Drake says. But Worm doesn't move. He just stares at Drake. Is he trying to tell me something? Drake wonders. Rori, Ana, and Bo walks up to Worm's cave with their dragons. "Is Worm coming?" Rori asks. Suddenly, Drake freezes. He hears words inside his head: Do not go into the tunnel!
